Project-1.title: Personal Portfolio
Project-1.description: A responsive personal portfolio website designed to showcase my web development projects, skills, and professional journey. Built dynamically using JSON to easily manage and render project data.

Project-2.title: Custom Alerts
Project-2.description: A lightweight, customizable UI component that replaces standard browser JavaScript alert dialogs with modern, aesthetically pleasing, and user-friendly pop-up notifications.

Project-3.title: Battle Pass Template
Project-3.description: An interactive, frontend UI template inspired by Fortnite's battle pass design. It features a responsive, scrollable tier-based progression system for showcasing unlockable rewards.

Project-4.title: Atestat AI
Project-4.description: An educational web project built for a high school graduation certificate (Atestat). It explores the concepts, history, and applications of Artificial Intelligence through an informative and interactive web interface.
